message:
fix(ready): filter identity beads from bd ready output, simplify formulas

Agent, role, and rig identity beads are status trackers, not actionable
work items. Filter them from bd ready by issue_type, labels, and ID
patterns (-role suffix, -rig- infix). Also simplify convoy-feed
return-to-pool step and witness-patrol formula (remove parallel flags,
streamline step descriptions, simplify loop-or-exit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
